---
title: "Château de Melville, ou, Recréations du cabinet d’étude, Le"
---

## Château de Melville, ou, Recréations du cabinet d’étude, Le

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1839
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** Chez Jacob & Johnson, Impremeurs, a Winchester: et chez Harris, St. Paul\'s Church-yard, a Londres.

### Notes

One of CMY’s rarest works, there are copies at Girton College, Cambridge and in the Bodleian Library.  The characters reappear under other names in <i>Scenes and Characters. Although it was printed privately, it seems to have been advertised for sale by Simpkin, who may perhaps have bought what was left of the stock.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
